text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 222 

RFRG_PRVDR_ID 

LABEL: Referring Provider Identification Number 

DESCRIPTION: A unique identification number assigned to a provider which identifies the physician or other provider 
who referred the patient. 

For physicians, this must be the individual’s ID number, not a group identification number. 

SHORT NAME: RFRG_PRVDR_ID 

LONG NAME: RFRG_PRVDR_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 30
